headline: Most ethical companies in the world includes six Wisconsin firms
summary: Oshkosh Corp. joins five other Wisconsin-based companies on Ethisphere's 2026 "World's Most Ethical Companies" list.

raw.headline: Most ethical companies in the world includes six Wisconsin firms

headline: How The PepsiCo (PEP) Investment Story Is Shifting On Pricing And 2026 Growth Hopes
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for PepsiCo has shifted slightly from US$170.81 to US$171.38, putting fresh attention on where the stock sits relative to targets in the low to mid US$170s. That adjustment reflects research that blends optimism around pricing and a 2026 product pipeline with more cautious views on execution and the path to the company’s longer term growth goals. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving PepsiCo narrative and what to watch as new...

headline: Coca-Cola Faces Margin Pressure: Can Pricing Power Hold?
summary: KO faces 2026 margin pressure as pricing normalizes, costs stay volatile, and volume recovery in India, China and Mexico becomes key to sustaining profit growth.
